Home Blog About Us Contact Us

Privacy Policy

Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how Dot Plot Maker handles your information.

Data Collection

Dot Plot Maker does not collect, store, or transmit the data you enter into the dot plot tool. All data processing occurs entirely within your web browser using client-side JavaScript.

Analytics

We may use privacy-respecting analytics tools to understand how visitors use our website. This may include anonymous data such as page views, browser type, and general geographic region. No personally identifiable information is collected through analytics.

Cookies

Our website may use essential cookies for basic functionality such as remembering your preferences. We do not use tracking cookies or share data with third-party advertisers.

Contact Form

If you use our contact form, the information you provide (name, email, message) is sent to our email via a third-party form service (Web3Forms). This data is used solely to respond to your inquiry and is not stored beyond what is necessary.

Third-Party Links

Our website may contain links to external sites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these third-party websites.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

Contact

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through our contact page or email us at contact@dotplotmaker.com.

Dot Plot Maker

Free online dot plot maker tool. Create, customize, and download beautiful dot plots for your data analysis, research papers, and presentations.
